n: Raid: The Master of Imlad Balchorth

steps.t: There are fell spirits in a ruined area not far from the Cauldron of Death in the central island of Imlad Balchorth. Ferndúr must be destroyed to disp…
Eiláf is back at Myrkworth, east from Ferndúr's lair. With Ferndúr slain, you should return to Eiláf to tell him the tale of your deeds.
